query:
SELECT id, firstName, lastName, email, pipelineStage, applicationSubmittedAt, createdAt, LEFT(adminNotes, 100) as adminNotes
FROM recruitment_prospects
WHERE email = 'maxillingworth@icloud.com'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT id, firstName, lastName, email, stage, createdAt
FROM prospects
WHERE email = 'maxillingworth@icloud.com'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
